A function checks number status. It uses modulus to find remainder.  
A prime has no divisors except one. A composite has more than one.  
* * *  
A loop tests numbers from two. A status is determined by division.  
A modulus shows if divisible. A status is prime or composite.  
* * *  
A function returns the result. A status is final outcome.  
A prime has no factors. A composite has multiple factors.
